creative_direction.reasoning: UGC-style portrait photograph (9:16) of a woman drinking AG1 from a shaker bottle, with a floating quote card + attribution label + offer stamp overlaid. Photo must feel creator-shot, not studio. Image-gen produces the full scene; quote card, attribution, and stamp composite in post for typographic accuracy.
creative_direction.concept_one_liner: UGC-style portrait of a relatable woman mid-drink, with editorial quote card and retro FREE stamp — feels like a friend's post, not an ad.

prompt_track_A_full_bake.description: Full bake with quote, attribution, and offer stamp overlaid in the image gen pass.

nano_banana_json.scene: Vertical 9:16 creator-style portrait photograph in natural outdoor daylight: a 30-something white/Latina woman with dark brown hair pulled back in a ponytail, mid-drink from a clear shaker bottle filled with dark green AG1 liquid. She's in a residential street or park setting. Over the photo float three graphic elements: a rounded white quote card in the upper third, a dark green attribution label below it, and a tilted retro-style green FREE stamp circle in the bottom-right.

subject.description: Woman in her 30s, dark brown hair in low ponytail, side profile slightly angled toward camera, holding a clear plastic shaker bottle with her right hand up at mouth level, drinking
subject.expression: eyes closed or half-closed, natural mid-sip expression (not posed)
subject.position_in_frame: centered, occupying lower 65% of vertical frame, head at around y:35%

environment.location: residential street or neighborhood park in mid-afternoon light
environment.background_elements: soft out-of-focus bokeh of trees and maybe a light-colored building, pale gray-green palette
environment.props: clear plastic shaker bottle, black screw-cap, filled with dark green AG1 liquid

lighting.key_light: natural overcast or backlit afternoon sun from upper-left
lighting.shadows: soft natural shadows, no studio control

composition.layout_archetype: UGC portrait + overlay-graphic stamps (Instagram story aesthetic)
composition.eye_flow: start at woman drinking, drift up to quote card, drift down-right to FREE stamp

style_directives: creator-shot / UGC feel — NOT studio photography
subtle film grain or natural digital noise
reference: Ritual, Olipop creator ads, AG1's own influencer-campaign work

overlay_graphics.quote_card: rounded white rectangle (~20px radius) occupying approximately x:10-90%, y:8-22% of canvas, with soft drop shadow (4-8px blur) giving it a 'taped onto the photo' sticker feel; contains quote text inside
overlay_graphics.attribution_label: dark forest green (#1E3A34) rounded pill label, approximately x:55-85%, y:22-26%, white text inside
overlay_graphics.free_stamp: tilted ~15° counterclockwise, circular, ~130px diameter, dark forest green (#1E3A34) fill, white text, retro grocery-flyer style, positioned bottom-right around x:70-90%, y:70-80%

text_elements_in_image.content:

how I just feel
more supported
in my gut health."
italic_substrings: more supported in my gut health

text_elements_in_image.content:
Real AG1 Member

text_elements_in_image.font: Sans — line 1 italic small caps, line 2 SemiBold italic, line 3 italic
text_elements_in_image.position: inside dark green attribution pill label, right-aligned

text_elements_in_image.font: Retro sans — 'Claim Your' italic sans, 'FREE' all-caps bold, 'Welcome Kit' italic sans
text_elements_in_image.style: tilted ~15° CCW, inside circular green stamp

negative_prompt: no posed smile looking at camera
no AG1 logo overlays (branding through the attribution label only)
no drop shadows on text (only on the quote-card sticker element)

prompt_track_B_background_only.description: Generate the UGC portrait photograph only. Empty white quote card, empty green attribution label, and empty green FREE stamp rendered as shapes without text. All text overlaid in post.

nano_banana_json.scene: Vertical 9:16 creator-style outdoor portrait: 30-something woman with dark ponytail in coral/salmon tank top, mid-drink from a clear shaker bottle filled with dark green AG1 liquid. Natural daylight, shallow DOF, blurred foliage background. Floating over the photo: an empty rounded white card in upper third (no text), an empty dark green pill label below it, and an empty tilted dark green circular stamp in bottom-right.
negative_prompt: no baked-in text in any overlay shape (card, label, stamp are empty)

elements.content: "It's really amazing how I just feel more supported in my gut health."
italic_substrings: more supported in my gut health

elements.content:
Real AG1 Member

assets.name: AG1 shaker bottle
assets.prompt_language_for_image_gen: Clear plastic shaker bottle with black screw cap, 'AG1' in white text on the side of the bottle, filled with opaque dark green (#1E3A34) liquid.

assets.name: FREE stamp graphic
assets.prompt_language_for_image_gen: Retro flyer-style circular stamp: dark forest green (#1E3A34) solid fill, ~130px diameter, tilted 15° counterclockwise, white text inside.

patterns_exemplified: DP-2 editorial serif on UGC photo
prompt_writer_training_notes: UGC feel is harder for image gen than studio — must explicitly say 'creator-shot', 'shallow DOF with natural bokeh', 'NOT studio photography', 'subtle film grain'. Default output is too clean/polished. Coral tank (#D97A82) + dark green liquid is deliberate complementary contrast — don't substitute with neutral colors. Retro FREE stamp tilt (-15°) is the single flourish breaking the clean design — a deliberate tonal tension per the design analysis.
